item.title: How to Think Like a Hacker: 8 Mindset Methods for Security Researchers
item.description: A practical guide to developing hacker mindset: reverse thinking, logic abuse, zero trust, system decomposition, and attack chaining.

item.title: API BOLA Explained with Realistic Examples
item.description: A practical explanation of Broken Object Level Authorization in APIs, with realistic examples, testing mindset, and remediation guidance.

item.title: API Broken Authentication: Common Testing Patterns
item.description: A practical checklist for identifying broken authentication patterns in APIs, from token handling to weak login flows and session lifecycle issues.

item.title: Burp Suite Beginner Workflow for Web Pentest
item.description: A practical beginner workflow for using Burp Suite during web pentesting, from proxy setup to Repeater, Intruder, notes, and reporting evidence.

item.title: CORS Misconfiguration: Simple Mistake, Serious Impact
item.description: A practical explanation of CORS misconfiguration, why it matters, how to recognize risky patterns, and how to fix it safely.

item.title: Credential Phishing: Defensive Lessons for Employees
item.description: A defensive guide for employees on credential phishing, password hygiene, MFA, phishing-resistant authentication, and reporting compromised credentials.

item.title: CVSS for Pentesters: How to Think About Severity
item.description: A practical guide for pentesters on using CVSS as a severity framework while still explaining real business impact clearly.

item.title: File Upload Security: What Can Go Wrong?
item.description: A practical overview of file upload vulnerabilities, common failure patterns, testing ideas, and secure design recommendations.

item.title: How to Design a Safe Phishing Simulation Program
item.description: A practical guide to designing ethical, safe, and useful phishing simulations that improve resilience without shaming employees.

item.title: How to Recognize a Suspicious Email
item.description: A practical checklist for identifying suspicious emails, links, attachments, sender inconsistencies, and business process red flags.

item.title: How to Write a Professional Vulnerability Report
item.description: A practical guide to writing clear, reproducible, and business-focused vulnerability reports for web application security testing.

item.title: JWT Security Testing Checklist
item.description: A practical checklist for testing JSON Web Token security in web applications and APIs.

item.title: Legal Recon for Web Pentesting
item.description: A practical guide to performing legal, scope-aware reconnaissance before a web pentest, without crossing authorization boundaries.

item.title: Lessons Learned from a Web Pentest Engagement
item.description: Practical lessons from web pentest engagements: scope discipline, recon quality, business logic testing, evidence, reporting, and remediation clarity.

item.title: Manual Testing vs Automated Scanning
item.description: A practical comparison of manual web security testing and automated scanning, including when to use each and why both matter.

item.title: My 15-Day Content Sprint for KevinSec
item.description: A transparent look at the 15-day content sprint used to build the first 30 KevinSec blog posts around web security, phishing awareness, and pentest methodology.

item.title: Password Reset Vulnerabilities: Common Patterns
item.description: A practical guide to common password reset vulnerabilities, how they appear in real applications, and how to test them safely.

item.title: Path Traversal and LFI: Reading Files You Should Not Read
item.description: A practical introduction to path traversal and local file inclusion from a web pentesting perspective, with safe testing guidance and remediation patterns.

item.title: Phishing Awareness: How Attackers Abuse Trust
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of phishing awareness, focused on how attackers exploit trust, urgency, authority, and routine behavior.

item.title: Rate Limiting: The Control That Many Apps Forget
item.description: A practical guide to rate limiting as a security control for login, OTP, password reset, API, and resource-intensive endpoints.

item.title: Reflected XSS Explained: Context, Root Cause, Impact
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of reflected cross-site scripting from context to root cause, impact, testing, and remediation.

item.title: SQL Injection Lab: From Error Message to Root Cause
item.description: A safe lab-style walkthrough showing how to reason from a SQL error message to the root cause of SQL injection.

item.title: SQL Injection: What Actually Happens Behind the Query
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of SQL injection from the perspective of query construction, untrusted data, and database interaction.

item.title: SSRF Explained for Developers and Pentesters
item.description: A practical explanation of Server-Side Request Forgery, why it happens, how to test it safely, and how developers can prevent it.

item.title: Stored XSS vs Reflected XSS: Practical Differences
item.description: A practical comparison of stored XSS and reflected XSS, including root cause, exploitability, impact, detection, and remediation.

item.title: Authentication Testing Checklist for Web Applications
item.description: A practical authentication testing checklist for web applications.

item.title: Broken Access Control: Why It Is Still Critical
item.description: Understand why broken access control remains one of the most critical web application security risks.

item.title: How to Read an HTTP Request Like a Pentester
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to reading HTTP requests from a web pentesting perspective.

item.title: IDOR Explained with a Simple Lab Scenario
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of IDOR using a safe lab scenario.

item.title: OWASP Top 10 2025 Explained for Beginners
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of the OWASP Top 10 2025 web application security risks.

item.title: Untrusted Data: The Root of Most Web Vulnerabilities
item.description: Understand why untrusted data is one of the most important concepts in web application security.

item.title: Research Note Template for Vulnerability Analysis
item.description: A sample research note template for vulnerability analysis on KevinSec.

item.title: How I Structure Practical Security Notes
item.description: A short note on how I structure practical security writing for KevinSec.

item.title: Welcome to KevinSec
item.description: KevinSec Updates
